sections.description: Auto-generate barcodes, design label templates, manage a print queue, and add products in seconds with the mobile Quick Add workflow.
sections.changelog:
1.2.3

  • Fixed: Barcode scanner returned unknown barcode for draft products — wc_get_product_id_by_sku() uses a lookup table that may exclude drafts; replaced with a direct _sku postmeta query that covers all statuses.
  • Improved: Error message now shows the scanned barcode value to help diagnose mismatches.

1.2.2

  • New: Live camera barcode scanner with auto-detect on both Quick Add and Inventory pages.

1.2.1

  • Maintenance release.

1.2.0

  • New: Batch Create and Scan-to-Publish workflow.
